title: senegalia andongensis
intro: Senegalia andongensis, also known as the Angolan thorn or Acacia andongensis, is a species of tree or shrub in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Senegalia andongensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
